text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day at training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You sure are focused, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm remembering right, Grandma's coming to
see your next race, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That is why I intend to run the best race I can
for her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Geez! Why did you have to come out today?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? I wonder what the all commotion is about?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, you said that today's race is important to
you, so...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: It is! It's a scrimmage and a bunch of trainers will be there!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
If you're there, then... I'll be too embarrassed to
run properly!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry... I'll be off then, so good luck with
your race, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what her deal is. Sounds like she was
arguing with her mom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Any mom who would show up to watch their kid's
scrimmage is cool in my book...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, you wanna go and have a chat with her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a sec? What was all that with your
mom just now?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, uh... My mom came to cheer me on for
my scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
But, like... I don't think I can run properly if she's
around...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
W-well, you know! It's kinda embarrassing! You
see where I'm coming from, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Do you really find your mother's support
embarrassing?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure you're not simply afraid you won't
live up to her expectations?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You should know that your mother is your first
fan and biggest supporter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She would never be disappointed in you, no
matter the result.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The important thing to do is to show your mother
your best efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That is what it means to race for your fans.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: My... my number one fan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Um... thank you so much! Mooom, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm positive she'll show her mother a
wonderful race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I too must put my best foot forward!
It's back to training for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll show Grandma an awesome race
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but of course. As I've said before,
expectations don't scare me. They only serve to
make me stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: At any rate, I have to get back to training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! If you wanna race with all you've got for
Grandma, then you've gotta give in to a craving
or two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I guess I'm not as focused as I
thought...
